mapper.sql: id, material_code, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, plan_type, demand_type, demand_strategy_code, vendor_lead_time, planning_time_fence, demand_time_fence, order_quantity, min_order_quantity, order_cycle_time, safety_stock_cal_type, safety_stock, safety_stock_factors, loss_rate, finished_rate, deleted, create_time, creator_id, update_time, updator_id, operator_name, tenant_id, material_desc, transfer_logical_plant_no
mapper.insert: insert into `pl_plan_material_parameter` (id, material_code, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, plan_type, demand_type,demand_strategy_code, vendor_lead_time, planning_time_fence, demand_time_fence, order_quantity, min_order_quantity, order_cycle_time, safety_stock_cal_type, safety_stock, safety_stock_factors, loss_rate, finished_rate, deleted, create_time, creator_id, update_time, updator_id, operator_name, tenant_id, material_desc, transfer_logical_plant_no) values (#{id}, #{materialCode}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{logicalPlantName}, #{planType}, #{demandType}, #{demandStrategyCode}, #{vendorLeadTime}, #{planningTimeFence}, #{demandTimeFence}, #{orderQuantity}, #{minOrderQuantity}, #{orderCycleTime}, #{safetyStockCalType}, #{safetyStock}, #{safetyStockFactors}, #{lossRate}, #{finishedRate}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime}, #{createUserId}, #{updateTime}, #{updateUserId}, #{operatorName}, #{tenantId}, #{materialDesc}, #{transferLogicalPlantNo})

insert into `pl_plan_material_parameter`
id,
material_code,
logical_plant_no,
logical_plant_name,
plan_type,
demand_type,
demand_strategy_code,
vendor_lead_time,
planning_time_fence,
demand_time_fence,
order_quantity,
min_order_quantity,
order_cycle_time,
safety_stock_cal_type,
safety_stock,
safety_stock_factors,
loss_rate,
finished_rate,
deleted,
create_time,
creator_id,
update_time,
updator_id,
operator_name,
tenant_id,
material_desc,
transfer_logical_plant_no,
#{id},
#{materialCode},
#{logicalPlantNo},
#{logicalPlantName},
#{planType},
#{demandType},
#{demandStrategyCode},
#{vendorLeadTime},
#{planningTimeFence},
#{demandTimeFence},
#{orderQuantity},
#{minOrderQuantity},
#{orderCycleTime},
#{safetyStockCalType},
#{safetyStock},
#{safetyStockFactors},
#{lossRate},
#{finishedRate},
#{isDelete},
#{createTime},
#{createUserId},
#{updateTime},
#{updateUserId},
#{operatorName},
#{tenantId},
#{materialDesc},
#{transferLogicalPlantNo},
mapper.update:
update `pl_plan_material_parameter`
material_code = #{materialCode},
logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo},
logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName},
plan_type = #{planType},
demand_type = #{demandType},
demand_strategy_code = #{demandStrategyCode},
vendor_lead_time = #{vendorLeadTime},
planning_time_fence = #{planningTimeFence},
demand_time_fence = #{demandTimeFence},
order_quantity = #{orderQuantity},
min_order_quantity = #{minOrderQuantity},
order_cycle_time = #{orderCycleTime},
safety_stock_cal_type = #{safetyStockCalType},
safety_stock = #{safetyStock},
safety_stock_factors = #{safetyStockFactors},
loss_rate = #{lossRate},
finished_rate = #{finishedRate},
deleted = #{isDelete},
create_time = #{createTime},
creator_id = #{createUserId},
update_time = #{updateTime},
updator_id = #{updateUserId},
operator_name = #{operatorName},
tenant_id = #{tenantId},
material_desc = #{materialDesc},
transfer_logical_plant_no = #{transferLogicalPlantNo},
where id = #{id}

update `pl_plan_material_parameter` set plan_type = #{planType}, demand_type = #{demandType}, demand_strategy_code = #{demandStrategyCode}, vendor_lead_time = #{vendorLeadTime}, planning_time_fence = #{planningTimeFence}, demand_time_fence = #{demandTimeFence}, order_quantity = #{orderQuantity}, min_order_quantity = #{minOrderQuantity}, order_cycle_time = #{orderCycleTime}, safety_stock_cal_type = #{safetyStockCalType}, safety_stock = #{safetyStock}, safety_stock_factors = #{safetyStockFactors}, loss_rate = #{lossRate}, finished_rate = #{finishedRate}, updator_id = #{updateUserId}, operator_name = #{operatorName}, transfer_logical_plant_no = #{transferLogicalPlantNo} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select
from `pl_plan_material_parameter` where deleted != 1 and (tenant_id, logical_plant_no, material_code) IN
(#{item.tenantId}, #{item.logicalPlantNo}, #{item.materialCode})
